zh.lifeSummary: 當James Singleton於1428年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Nicholas Singleton of Broughton31歲，母親Margaret Preston30歲。他於1448年與Agnes Hoghton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1474年在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Singleton于1428年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Singleton of Broughton31岁，母亲Margaret Preston30岁。他于1448年与Agnes Hoghton在英国英格兰藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1474年在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When James Singleton was born in 1428, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Singleton of Broughton, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Preston, was 30. He married Agnes Hoghton in 1448, in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1474, in Preston, Lancashire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Singleton est né en 1428, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Singleton of Broughton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Preston, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Hoghton en 1448, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1474, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Singleton 1428 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Singleton of Broughton 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Preston 30. Er hat 1448 in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Hoghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1474 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Preston, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Singleton è nato il nel 1428 nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Singleton of Broughton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Preston, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Hoghton nel 1448, nel Whalley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1474, nel Preston, Lancashire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: James Singleton(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Singleton of Broughton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Preston(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 화알리에서 Agnes Hoghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1474년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Singleton родился в 1428 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Singleton of Broughton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Preston, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Hoghton в 1448 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1474 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Singleton nació en 1428, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Singleton of Broughton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Preston, tenía 30 años.
